case_summary: Old land settlement record shows my land belongs to a different survey number.
reasoning: Survey number mismatch in settlement records is corrected by revenue department.
steps: Apply for correction of survey number to Tahsildar
Submit settlement records and patta
Request fresh demarcation

case_summary: Sister excluded from father's will despite being equal legal heir under Hindu law.
reasoning: Daughter's equal right in father's property under Hindu Succession Act is enforceable in civil court.
steps: File civil suit for share in property
Submit birth certificate proving legal heirship
Cite Section 6 of Hindu Succession Act

case_summary: Tenant died; his adult sons continue to occupy my house claiming tenancy rights.
reasoning: Tenancy inheritance by sons is regulated; owner can challenge before Rent Controller.
steps: File eviction petition before Rent Controller
Submit death certificate of original tenant
Check if sons qualify as statutory tenants

case_summary: बिल्डर ने प्लॉट की रजिस्ट्री करने से मना कर दिया पूरी राशि लेने के बाद।
reasoning: पूरा पैसा लेकर रजिस्ट्री न करना उपभोक्ता अधिकारों का उल्लंघन है।
steps: उपभोक्ता फोरम में शिकायत दर्ज करें
भुगतान रसीद और समझौता प्रस्तुत करें
पुलिस में धोखाधड़ी की FIR दर्ज करें

case_summary: Bank auctioned my mortgaged agricultural land below market value.
reasoning: Under-value auction of mortgaged land can be challenged in Debt Recovery Tribunal.
steps: File appeal before Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT)
Submit valuation report
Request stay on auction proceedings

case_summary: My plot in housing society was allotted to another member after I paid full amount.
reasoning: Double allotment by housing society is consumer deficiency requiring forum complaint.
steps: File consumer complaint against society
Submit allotment letter and payment receipts
Seek alternate allotment or refund with interest

case_summary: Encroacher claims he has been occupying my land for 25 years and has adverse possession.
reasoning: Adverse possession claim requires civil court to evaluate validity and protect owner's rights.
steps: File civil suit immediately to interrupt limitation
Submit records proving your continuous ownership
Counter adverse possession claim with evidence

case_summary: Cooperative bank illegally wrote off my loan and reported land as bank property.
reasoning: Illegal write-off and misreporting of mortgage requires civil court and cooperative registrar action.
steps: File complaint with Cooperative Registrar
File civil suit for declaration
Submit loan documents disproving write-off

case_summary: मेरे खेत के रास्ते पर पड़ोसी ने ताला लगा दिया और आने-जाने से रोक रहा है।
reasoning: रास्ते के अधिकार को अवरुद्ध करना सिविल कोर्ट में निषेधाज्ञा का आधार है।
steps: सिविल कोर्ट में रास्ते के अधिकार हेतु वाद दाखिल करें
राजस्व नक्शे में रास्ते का प्रमाण प्रस्तुत करें
अंतरिम राहत के लिए आवेदन करें

case_summary: पिता ने जीवनकाल में जमीन मेरे नाम की, लेकिन भाई रजिस्ट्री मानने से इनकार कर रहा है।
reasoning: वैध पंजीकृत उपहार विलेख को भाई द्वारा चुनौती देने पर सिविल कोर्ट से राहत मिलेगी।
steps: सिविल कोर्ट में स्वामित्व घोषणा का वाद दायर करें
पंजीकृत गिफ्ट डीड प्रस्तुत करें
निषेधाज्ञा का आवेदन करें

case_summary: Land acquisition notice issued for road widening but no compensation offered.
reasoning: Government acquisition without fair compensation can be challenged in civil court.
steps: File objection with District Collector within notice period
Approach civil court for fair compensation
Submit land valuation report

case_summary: Old registered sale deed found with someone else's name for same land I hold title to.
reasoning: Conflicting registered deeds require civil court declaration to establish valid title.
steps: File declaratory suit for title
Submit both conflicting sale deeds
Prove chain of title and possession

case_summary: Scheduled caste tribal land illegally purchased by non-tribal using benami transaction.
reasoning: Sale of tribal land to non-tribal is prohibited and void; civil court will cancel transaction.
steps: File complaint with Sub-Divisional Officer
File civil suit to cancel illegal sale
Engage tribal rights legal aid

case_summary: Land records mutated in someone else's name fraudulently using forged death certificate.
reasoning: Fraudulent mutation using forged documents is civil fraud; court will cancel mutation.
steps: File civil suit to cancel fraudulent mutation
Submit evidence of forged death certificate
File police FIR for forgery

case_summary: Landlord is cutting off water and electricity to force tenant to vacate illegally.
reasoning: Illegal harassment by landlord is actionable in civil court for injunction and damages.
steps: File complaint with police for harassment
File civil suit for injunction against landlord
Complain to Rent Controller

case_summary: Revenue record shows different owner name but I have original registered sale deed.
reasoning: Mismatch between revenue records and sale deed requires mutation by revenue department.
steps: Apply for mutation to Mandal Revenue Officer
Submit registered sale deed
Request correction in revenue records

case_summary: Crop loan taken on land; bank refuses to give NOC even after repayment.
reasoning: Bank's refusal to give NOC after full repayment is actionable via Ombudsman and civil court.
steps: Send legal notice to bank
File complaint with Banking Ombudsman
File civil suit for issuance of NOC

case_summary: मकान मालिक ने बिना नोटिस मेरा सामान बाहर फेंक कर घर बंद कर दिया।
reasoning: जबरन बेदखली अवैध है, सिविल कोर्ट से तुरंत राहत और पुनः कब्जे का आदेश मिल सकता है।
steps: पुलिस में तुरंत शिकायत करें
सिविल कोर्ट में अंतरिम निषेधाज्ञा के लिए आवेदन करें
किराया नियंत्रक के समक्ष शिकायत दर्ज करें

case_summary: Forest land being encroached and converted to agriculture by powerful landlord.
reasoning: Forest encroachment requires High Court PIL and Forest Department action.
steps: File complaint with District Forest Officer
File PIL in High Court
Report to National Green Tribunal

case_summary: बैंक ने खेत की जमीन को बिना मेरी जानकारी के तीसरे व्यक्ति को बेच दिया।
reasoning: बिना सूचना के भूमि बिक्री DRT में चुनौती योग्य है और सिविल कोर्ट राहत देगी।
steps: ऋण वसूली न्यायाधिकरण (DRT) में अपील दायर करें
सिविल कोर्ट में बिक्री रद्द करने का वाद दायर करें
बैंकिंग लोकपाल में शिकायत करें
